zh.title: 2026 年国产 AI 模型全景：DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM、MiniMax 怎么选
zh.metaTitle: 2026 年国产 AI 模型全景：DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM、MiniMax 怎么选
zh.description: 2026 年国产大模型全景对比：DeepSeek R1、Qwen3 Max、Kimi K2、GLM-4.6、MiniMax abab、Yi、Baichuan。价格、长上下文、中文质量、合规、出海可用性，一篇看完不用再到处找。
zh.ogTitle: 2026 年国产 AI 模型全景：DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM、MiniMax
zh.ogDescription: 国产大模型怎么选：价格、长上下文、中文、合规、出海可用性全方位对比。
zh.headline: 2026 年国产 AI 模型全景：DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM、MiniMax 怎么选

faq.q: 2026 年最强的国产 AI 大模型是哪个？
faq.a: 综合最强是 DeepSeek R1（推理、代码、性价比全部前列）。中文质量和多模态最强是 Qwen3 Max。长上下文最强是 Kimi K2（200 万 token）。结构化输出和工具调用稳是 GLM-4.6。语音和创意写作有亮点的是 MiniMax abab。每个模型都有自己的强项，不是一个赢家通吃。

faq.q: 国产模型出海合规怎么办？
faq.a: 两条路。一是用 OpenRouter / Together AI / Fireworks 等海外托管 — 它们部署相同的开源权重（DeepSeek、Qwen 都开源），数据不进入中国大陆。二是自托管：买 GPU 或租 AWS/GCP 跑开源版本，数据完全可控。直接用厂商官方 API 时，海外用户和欧美企业普遍有数据合规顾虑。

faq.q: DeepSeek 和 Qwen 哪个写代码更强？
faq.a: DeepSeek R1 在 SWE-bench Verified、HumanEval、LiveCodeBench 跑分上略胜，整体 agent 编程更稳。Qwen3 Coder 在前端、HTML/CSS/Tailwind、组件生成场景反馈更好。要做 agent / 重构选 DeepSeek，要写网页 / 做 demo 选 Qwen3 Coder。

faq.q: 国产模型的价格优势还能保持吗？
faq.a: 短期能。2026 年 DeepSeek R1、Qwen3 Max 的价格分别只有 GPT-5 的 1/5 和 1/3。背后原因：自研 MoE 架构降本 + 国内政府补贴 + 内卷竞争。中长期取决于美国 GPU 出口管制、训练 + 推理成本曲线、以及厂商商业化压力。建议持续关注。

faq.q: 普通独立开发者 / 创业者该用哪个？
faq.a: 主力 DeepSeek R1（性价比 + 质量平衡），中文重 / 多语言场景加 Qwen3 Max，需要超长上下文（整本书、整库）切 Kimi K2。海外用户走 OpenRouter 转接。三个加起来 95% 场景都覆盖了。

en.title: The 2026 Chinese AI Model Landscape: How to Choose Among DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax
en.metaTitle: The 2026 Chinese AI Model Landscape: How to Choose Among DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax
en.description: A full 2026 comparison of Chinese open models: DeepSeek R1, Qwen3 Max, Kimi K2, GLM-4.6, MiniMax abab, Yi, Baichuan. Price, long context, Chinese quality, access, and international availability in one read.
en.ogTitle: The 2026 Chinese AI Model Landscape: DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax
en.ogDescription: How to choose a Chinese model: price, long context, Chinese, access, and international availability compared.
en.headline: The 2026 Chinese AI Model Landscape: How to Choose Among DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax

faq.q: Which is the strongest Chinese AI model in 2026?
faq.a: The strongest all-round is DeepSeek R1 (front of the pack on reasoning, code, and value). The strongest on Chinese quality and multimodal is Qwen3 Max. The strongest on long context is Kimi K2 (2 million tokens). The most reliable for structured output and tool calling is GLM-4.6. The standout for voice and creative writing is MiniMax abab. Each model has its own strength; there is no single winner that takes all.

faq.q: How do international users handle access and compliance for Chinese models?
faq.a: Two paths. One is overseas hosting via OpenRouter / Together AI / Fireworks, which deploy the same open weights (both DeepSeek and Qwen are open) without data entering mainland China. The other is self-hosting: buy GPUs or rent AWS/GCP to run the open versions, with full control over your data. When using a vendor's official API directly, international users and Western enterprises commonly have data-compliance concerns.

faq.q: Which writes better code, DeepSeek or Qwen?
faq.a: DeepSeek R1 edges ahead on SWE-bench Verified, HumanEval, and LiveCodeBench scores, and is steadier overall at agent coding. Qwen3 Coder gets better feedback on front-end, HTML/CSS/Tailwind, and component generation. Pick DeepSeek for agents and refactoring, Qwen3 Coder for web pages and demos.

faq.q: Can Chinese models keep their price advantage?
faq.a: Short term, yes. In 2026 DeepSeek R1 and Qwen3 Max cost only 1/5 and 1/3 of GPT-5 respectively. The reasons behind it: in-house MoE architectures cutting cost, domestic government subsidies, and cutthroat competition. Over the medium-to-long term it depends on US GPU export controls, the training + inference cost curve, and commercial pressure on the vendors. Worth watching.

faq.q: Which should a typical indie developer or founder use?
faq.a: DeepSeek R1 as the main model (a balance of value and quality), add Qwen3 Max for Chinese-heavy or multilingual cases, and switch to Kimi K2 when you need very long context (a whole book, a whole repo). International users route through OpenRouter. The three together cover 95% of scenarios.

zh.title: Claude Opus 4.7 深度评测：SWE-bench 87.6%、价格不变、谁该升级
zh.metaTitle: Claude Opus 4.7 深度评测 2026：SWE-bench 87.6%、价格不变、谁该升级
zh.description: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 全面评测：SWE-bench Verified 87.6%、SWE-bench Pro 64.3%、Terminal-Bench 69.4%。1M 上下文、价格 $5/$25 不变、tokenizer 多耗 35%、xhigh effort、task budget、高分辨率图像、幻觉率从 61% 降到 36%。和 GPT-5.4、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Sonnet 4.6 横向对比。
zh.ogTitle: Claude Opus 4.7 深度评测 2026：SWE-bench 87.6%、价格不变、谁该升级
zh.ogDescription: Anthropic 最新旗舰：跑分、价格、tokenizer 隐性涨价、agent / vision 改进、和 GPT-5.4 / Gemini 3.1 Pro 横向对比。
zh.headline: Claude Opus 4.7 深度评测 2026：SWE-bench 87.6%、价格不变、谁该升级

faq.q: Claude Opus 4.7 什么时候发布的？
faq.a: 2026 年 4 月 16 日发布。API model ID 是 claude-opus-4-7，通过 Anthropic 官方 API、AWS Bedrock、Azure、Google Vertex 四个渠道同时上线。这是截至 2026 年 5 月 Anthropic 公开的最强模型。

faq.q: Claude Opus 4.7 价格是多少？
faq.a: $5 每百万输入 token、$25 每百万输出 token，与 Opus 4.6 持平。prompt cache 命中可省 90%，batch API 半价。但 4.7 用了新 tokenizer，同样的文本会多消耗 1.0 到 1.35 倍的 token，所以实际账单可能涨 0-35%。Anthropic 官方在 artificialanalysis 跑同一套 benchmark 时反而省了 11%（$4,406 vs $4,970），说明效率提升能部分抵消 tokenizer 涨价。

faq.q: Opus 4.7 比 Opus 4.6 强多少？
faq.a: SWE-bench Verified 87.6% vs 80.8%（+6.8 分）、SWE-bench Pro 64.3% vs 53.4%（+10.9 分，最大跳跃）、Terminal-Bench 69.4% vs 65.4%、OSWorld 78% vs 72.7%、CharXiv 视觉 82.1% vs 69.1%（+13 分）、幻觉率 36% vs 61%（重要改进）。Agent / 视觉 / 长时间任务三个方向都明显提升。

faq.q: Opus 4.7 比 GPT-5.4 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro 强吗？
faq.a: 看场景。Agent 编程：Opus 4.7 SWE-bench Pro 64.3% 领先（GPT-5.4 是 57.7%、Gemini 3.1 Pro 54.2%）。终端代码：GPT-5.5 在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 拿 82.7%，明显高于 Opus 4.7 的 69.4%。Web research：GPT-5.4 Pro 拿 89.3% 大幅领先 Opus 4.7 的 79.3%。科学推理 GPQA：三家几乎并列 94%。一句话：Opus 4.7 是 agent 编程 + 长时间工作流之王，但单项跑分并非样样第一。

faq.q: Opus 4.7 有哪些新功能？
faq.a: 四个：（1）高分辨率图像支持，最大 2576px / 3.75MP，对 computer use、截图理解、文档处理是大改进；（2）新的 xhigh effort 等级，给编程和 agent 场景用；（3）task budgets（beta），给 agent 一个 token 预算让它自己分配；（4）adaptive thinking 成唯一推理模式，删除了 extended thinking 的 budget_tokens 配置。temperature / top_p / top_k 也不能再设。

faq.q: 我应该升级到 Opus 4.7 吗？
faq.a: 用 Opus 4.6 在做 agent 编程 / computer use / 长 agentic loop 的：必须升级，SWE-bench Pro +10.9 分质变。用 Sonnet 4.6 但成本不敏感的：可以试，质量明显上一档。用 GPT-5.4 Pro 做 Web research 重度场景的：不用换，那块 GPT 更强。用 DeepSeek R1 / Qwen 省成本的：不用换，Opus 4.7 是 $5/$25，DeepSeek 是 $0.55/$2.19，差 9 倍。

sources.claim: Claude Opus 4.7 官方发布与规格

en.title: Claude Opus 4.7 Review: SWE-bench 87.6%, Same Price, Who Should Upgrade
en.metaTitle: Claude Opus 4.7 Review 2026: SWE-bench 87.6%, Same Price, Who Should Upgrade
en.description: A full review of Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7: SWE-bench Verified 87.6%, SWE-bench Pro 64.3%, Terminal-Bench 69.4%. 1M context, unchanged $5/$25 pricing, 35% more tokens from the new tokenizer, xhigh effort, task budgets, high-resolution images, hallucination rate down from 61% to 36%. Compared head-to-head with GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Sonnet 4.6.
en.ogTitle: Claude Opus 4.7 Review 2026: SWE-bench 87.6%, Same Price, Who Should Upgrade
en.ogDescription: Anthropic's latest flagship: benchmarks, price, the hidden tokenizer hike, agent / vision gains, and a head-to-head with GPT-5.4 / Gemini 3.1 Pro.
en.headline: Claude Opus 4.7 Review 2026: SWE-bench 87.6%, Same Price, Who Should Upgrade

faq.q: When was Claude Opus 4.7 released?
faq.a: Released on April 16, 2026. The API model ID is claude-opus-4-7, available simultaneously across four channels: the official Anthropic API, AWS Bedrock, Azure, and Google Vertex. It is the strongest model Anthropic has made public as of May 2026.

faq.q: How much does Claude Opus 4.7 cost?
faq.a: $5 per million input tokens and $25 per million output tokens, the same as Opus 4.6. A prompt-cache hit saves 90%, and the batch API is half price. But 4.7 uses a new tokenizer, so the same text consumes 1.0 to 1.35x the tokens, which means your real bill could rise 0-35%. On Artificial Analysis, running the same benchmark suite, Anthropic actually saved 11% ($4,406 vs $4,970), showing that efficiency gains can partly offset the tokenizer hike.

faq.q: How much stronger is Opus 4.7 than Opus 4.6?
faq.a: SWE-bench Verified 87.6% vs 80.8% (+6.8), SWE-bench Pro 64.3% vs 53.4% (+10.9, the biggest jump), Terminal-Bench 69.4% vs 65.4%, OSWorld 78% vs 72.7%, CharXiv vision 82.1% vs 69.1% (+13), hallucination rate 36% vs 61% (an important improvement). All three directions, agent, vision, and long-running tasks, clearly improved.

faq.q: Is Opus 4.7 stronger than GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 Pro?
faq.a: It depends on the use case. Agent coding: Opus 4.7 leads on SWE-bench Pro at 64.3% (GPT-5.4 is 57.7%, Gemini 3.1 Pro 54.2%). Terminal code: GPT-5.5 scores 82.7% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, clearly above Opus 4.7's 69.4%. Web research: GPT-5.4 Pro takes 89.3%, well ahead of Opus 4.7's 79.3%. Scientific reasoning GPQA: the three are nearly tied at 94%. In one line: Opus 4.7 is the king of agent coding and long-running workflows, but it is not first on every single benchmark.

faq.q: What new features does Opus 4.7 have?
faq.a: Four: (1) high-resolution image support, up to 2576px / 3.75MP, a big improvement for computer use, screenshot understanding, and document processing; (2) a new xhigh effort level for coding and agent use; (3) task budgets (beta), giving an agent a token budget to allocate itself; (4) adaptive thinking as the only reasoning mode, with extended thinking's budget_tokens config removed. temperature / top_p / top_k can no longer be set either.

faq.q: Should I upgrade to Opus 4.7?
faq.a: If you use Opus 4.6 for agent coding / computer use / long agentic loops: upgrade, the +10.9 on SWE-bench Pro is a step change. If you use Sonnet 4.6 and cost isn't a concern: worth a try, the quality is a clear notch higher. If you use GPT-5.4 Pro heavily for web research: don't switch, GPT is stronger there. If you use DeepSeek R1 / Qwen to save cost: don't switch, Opus 4.7 is $5/$25 and DeepSeek is $0.55/$2.19, a 9x difference.

sources.claim: Claude Opus 4.7 official release and specs

zh.title: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5：性价比到底差几倍
zh.metaTitle: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 性价比对决：到底差几倍？（2026 年实测）
zh.description: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 性价比全面对比。每百万 token 真实价格、SWE-bench / MMLU 跑分、3 个真实工作流成本计算、什么时候 GPT-5 反而值得多花钱。一文看完不再纠结。
zh.ogTitle: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 性价比对决（2026）
zh.ogDescription: 价格、跑分、3 个真实工作流成本计算。一文看完不再纠结。
zh.headline: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 性价比对决：到底差几倍

faq.q: DeepSeek R1 比 GPT-5 便宜几倍？
faq.a: 输入价 GPT-5 是 DeepSeek R1 的 4.5 倍（$2.50 vs $0.55），输出价是 4.6 倍（$10 vs $2.19）。同一份工作量 GPT-5 通常贵 5 倍左右。开 batch + cache 后差距能拉大到 6-8 倍。

faq.q: DeepSeek R1 性能真的能追平 GPT-5 吗？
faq.a: 在数学（AIME）、代码（HumanEval、LiveCodeBench）、推理类 benchmark 上 DeepSeek R1 已经追平甚至略超 GPT-5。但长 agent 循环、工具调用稳定性、模糊指令理解上 GPT-5 仍领先。简单说：单点任务 DeepSeek 够用，复杂代理 GPT-5 更稳。

faq.q: 什么场景该用 GPT-5 而不是 DeepSeek？
faq.a: 需要 5+ 步工具调用的 agent、模糊需求需要反问澄清、深度推理 + 创意结合、生产环境对每次输出质量要求 99%+ 时，GPT-5 更值。便宜 5 倍但循环 5 次的 DeepSeek 总成本反而更高。

faq.q: DeepSeek R1 数据安全吗？
faq.a: 官方 API 数据存于中国，对中国境外用户可能有合规问题。可选方案：用第三方托管（Together AI、Fireworks、OpenRouter 等海外服务器跑相同模型权重），或自托管（开源权重，48GB 显卡起）。

faq.q: DeepSeek 在 OpenRouter 比官方便宜吗？
faq.a: 价格基本相同，OpenRouter 加少量路由费。但优势是同一个 OpenAI 兼容接口可同时调用 GPT-5、Claude、Gemini，A/B 测试不用注册多次。

en.title: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5: How Many Times Cheaper, Really
en.metaTitle: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 Value Showdown: How Many Times Cheaper? (2026 Tested)
en.description: A full DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 value comparison. Real per-million-token prices, SWE-bench / MMLU benchmarks, cost math on 3 real workflows, and when GPT-5 is worth paying more for. One read to stop second-guessing.
en.ogTitle: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 Value Showdown (2026)
en.ogDescription: Price, benchmarks, and cost math on 3 real workflows. One read to stop second-guessing.
en.headline: DeepSeek R1 vs GPT-5 Value Showdown: How Many Times Cheaper

faq.q: How many times cheaper is DeepSeek R1 than GPT-5?
faq.a: On input price, GPT-5 is 4.5x DeepSeek R1 ($2.50 vs $0.55); on output, 4.6x ($10 vs $2.19). For the same workload GPT-5 is usually about 5x more expensive. With batch + cache on, the gap can widen to 6-8x.

faq.q: Can DeepSeek R1 really match GPT-5 on performance?
faq.a: On math (AIME), code (HumanEval, LiveCodeBench), and reasoning benchmarks, DeepSeek R1 has matched or slightly surpassed GPT-5. But on long agent loops, tool-calling reliability, and understanding fuzzy instructions, GPT-5 still leads. In short: DeepSeek is enough for single-point tasks, GPT-5 is steadier for complex agents.

faq.q: When should you use GPT-5 instead of DeepSeek?
faq.a: For agents that need 5+ tool-call steps, fuzzy requirements that need clarifying questions, deep reasoning combined with creativity, or production that demands 99%+ quality on every output, GPT-5 is worth more. A DeepSeek that is 5x cheaper but loops 5 times can end up costing more overall.

faq.q: Is DeepSeek R1's data safe?
faq.a: The official API stores data in China, which may pose compliance issues for users outside China. Alternatives: use third-party hosting (Together AI, Fireworks, OpenRouter, and other overseas servers running the same model weights), or self-host (open weights, 48GB GPU and up).

faq.q: Is DeepSeek cheaper on OpenRouter than the official API?
faq.a: The price is basically the same, with OpenRouter adding a small routing fee. The advantage is that one OpenAI-compatible endpoint can call GPT-5, Claude, and Gemini at the same time, so A/B testing doesn't require signing up multiple times.

zh.ogTitle: GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6：写代码选哪个（2026）
zh.ogDescription: 跑分、Cursor 实测、价格、多文件重构、工具调用，一篇决定。
zh.headline: GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6：写代码到底选哪个（2026 年实测）

faq.q: GPT-5 和 Claude Sonnet 4.6 写代码哪个强？
faq.a: agent 编程（Cursor、Cline、Aider、SWE-bench）Claude Sonnet 4.6 更强；单点推理和算法题、HumanEval 类跑分 GPT-5 更强。日常工程师 2026 年大多偏好 Claude，因为它工具调用更稳、不乱改无关代码。

faq.q: 两个模型价格差多少？
faq.a: Claude Sonnet 4.6 约 $3 输入 / $15 输出 每百万 token。GPT-5 约 $2.50 / $10。GPT-5 整体便宜 30-40%，Claude Haiku 4.5 比两者都便宜很多（$0.80 / $4）。

faq.q: 哪个更适合 Cursor？
faq.a: Claude Sonnet 4.6 是 Cursor 默认推荐，多文件编辑、工具调用、不破坏既有代码风格上更稳。GPT-5 在解释代码、重构思路、解决疑难杂症时是最佳备选。

faq.q: 上下文谁更长？
faq.a: GPT-5 是 400K，Claude Sonnet 4.6 标准 200K（beta 1M）。两者 100K 内召回都很好，500K 之后 Claude 略稳。仓库规模超过 50 万 token 仍然建议用 Gemini 2.5 Pro。

en.title: GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6: Which to Pick for Coding
en.metaTitle: GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6: Which to Pick for Coding (2026 Tested)
en.description: A full GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6 coding comparison. SWE-bench / HumanEval benchmarks, Cursor hands-on testing, API price, multi-file refactoring, tool-calling reliability. One read and you are done.
en.ogTitle: GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6: Which to Pick for Coding (2026)
en.ogDescription: Benchmarks, Cursor testing, price, multi-file refactoring, tool calling, decided in one read.
en.headline: GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6: Which to Pick for Coding (2026 Tested)

faq.q: Which writes better code, GPT-5 or Claude Sonnet 4.6?
faq.a: For agent coding (Cursor, Cline, Aider, SWE-bench), Claude Sonnet 4.6 is stronger; for single-point reasoning, algorithm problems, and HumanEval-style benchmarks, GPT-5 is stronger. In 2026 most working engineers lean Claude because its tool calling is steadier and it does not edit unrelated code.

faq.q: How much do the two differ in price?
faq.a: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is about $3 input / $15 output per million tokens. GPT-5 is about $2.50 / $10. GPT-5 is 30-40% cheaper overall, and Claude Haiku 4.5 is much cheaper than both ($0.80 / $4).

faq.q: Which is better for Cursor?
faq.a: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is Cursor's default recommendation, steadier on multi-file edits, tool calling, and not breaking the existing code style. GPT-5 is the best alternative for explaining code, refactoring approaches, and solving tricky problems.

faq.q: Which has the longer context?
faq.a: GPT-5 is 400K, Claude Sonnet 4.6 is 200K standard (1M beta). Both recall well within 100K, and beyond 500K Claude is slightly steadier. For repos over 500,000 tokens, Gemini 2.5 Pro is still the recommendation.

zh.title: 本地部署开源大模型完全指南：显卡、显存、框架、模型怎么选
zh.metaTitle: 本地部署开源大模型完全指南 2026：显卡、显存、框架、模型怎么选
zh.description: 2026 年本地跑开源大模型完全指南：DeepSeek R1 蒸馏版、Qwen3、Llama 4、GLM-4 的显存需求，INT4/INT8/FP16 量化怎么算，Ollama / vLLM / llama.cpp / LM Studio 怎么选，RTX 4060 到 A100 各档显卡能跑多大模型，Apple Silicon 统一内存方案，真实电费成本。一篇看完不踩坑。
zh.ogTitle: 本地部署开源大模型完全指南 2026
zh.ogDescription: 显卡、显存、量化、框架、模型——一篇讲清本地跑大模型怎么选。
zh.headline: 本地部署开源大模型完全指南 2026

faq.q: 本地跑大模型最少要什么显卡？
faq.a: 看模型大小和量化。7B 模型 INT4 量化只要 4-5GB 显存，RTX 3060 12GB / 4060 8GB 就能跑。想要 FP16 原始精度的 7B 要 16GB（RTX 4060 Ti 16GB / 4080）。32B INT4 要约 20GB（RTX 4090/5090 32GB）。70B INT4 要约 40GB，得 RTX 6000 Ada 48GB 或双卡。没独显也能用 llama.cpp 走 CPU + 内存，但慢。

faq.q: Ollama 和 vLLM 有什么区别，该用哪个？
faq.a: Ollama：一行命令装好跑起来，支持 CPU/GPU 混合、动态卸载，适合个人、单机、桌面、试验。vLLM：生产级高吞吐，支持 Chunked Prefill、Prefix Caching、多卡并行，要 CUDA 12.4+，适合做服务给多人用。个人本地玩选 Ollama，要做产品 API 选 vLLM。Mac 用户用 LM Studio 或 llama.cpp（Metal/MLX 加速）。

faq.q: INT4、INT8、FP16 量化怎么选？
faq.a: FP16 = 原始精度，每参数 2 字节，质量最好但显存最贵（7B 约 16GB）。INT8 显存减半（7B 约 8GB），质量损失很小。INT4（q4_k_m）显存降到约 1/4（7B 约 4-5GB），速度最快，质量损失个位数百分点，是个人部署的甜点。除非做严肃生产或评测，个人本地一律 INT4 起步。

faq.q: 2026 年本地跑哪个开源模型最好？
faq.a: 综合推理：DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B/32B（蒸馏版小而强）。中文 + 多语言：Qwen3 系列。通用 + 生态：Llama 4。Agent / 工具调用：GLM-4-9B。代码：Qwen3 Coder / DeepSeek Coder。独立开发者首选 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B（4GB 显存能跑、推理质量接近云端中端模型）。

faq.q: 本地部署比用 API 便宜吗？
faq.a: 看用量。低频（每天几十次）：用 API 更便宜，不用买显卡。高频 + 长期 + 数据敏感：本地划算。一张 RTX 4090（约 ¥13000）+ 电费（满载约 0.4 度/小时），跑 DeepSeek 蒸馏 7B 每天几千次调用，半年到一年回本，之后边际成本接近电费。最大价值不是省钱，是数据不出本地 + 无限调用 + 离线可用。

faq.q: Mac 能本地跑大模型吗？
faq.a: 能，而且 Apple Silicon 的统一内存是隐藏优势。M3/M4 Max 64-128GB 内存里大部分能当显存用，量化后能跑 70B。用 LM Studio（图形界面）或 llama.cpp（命令行，Metal 加速），新框架 MLX 是 Apple 原生优化，速度比通用方案快。128GB 的 M4 Max 跑量化 70B 体验接近一张专业卡，且静音省电。

en.title: The Complete Guide to Running Open-Source LLMs Locally: GPU, VRAM, Frameworks, Models
en.metaTitle: The Complete Guide to Running Open-Source LLMs Locally 2026: GPU, VRAM, Frameworks, Models
en.description: A complete 2026 guide to running open-source LLMs locally: VRAM requirements for DeepSeek R1 distilled, Qwen3, Llama 4, and GLM-4, how to size INT4/INT8/FP16 quantization, how to choose Ollama / vLLM / llama.cpp / LM Studio, how big a model each GPU from RTX 4060 to A100 can run, Apple Silicon unified-memory setups, and real electricity costs. One read and no pitfalls.
en.ogTitle: The Complete Guide to Running Open-Source LLMs Locally 2026
en.ogDescription: GPU, VRAM, quantization, frameworks, models: one piece on how to choose for running LLMs locally.
en.headline: The Complete Guide to Running Open-Source LLMs Locally 2026

faq.q: What is the minimum GPU to run an LLM locally?
faq.a: It depends on model size and quantization. A 7B model at INT4 needs only 4-5GB of VRAM, so an RTX 3060 12GB / 4060 8GB can run it. Full FP16 precision for a 7B needs 16GB (RTX 4060 Ti 16GB / 4080). A 32B at INT4 needs about 20GB (RTX 4090/5090 32GB). A 70B at INT4 needs about 40GB, so an RTX 6000 Ada 48GB or dual cards. With no discrete GPU you can still use llama.cpp on CPU + RAM, but it is slow.

faq.q: What is the difference between Ollama and vLLM, and which should I use?
faq.a: Ollama: one command to install and run, supports mixed CPU/GPU and dynamic offloading, good for personal, single-machine, desktop, experimental use. vLLM: production-grade high throughput, supports Chunked Prefill, Prefix Caching, and multi-card parallelism, needs CUDA 12.4+, good for serving to many users. For personal local use pick Ollama; for a product API pick vLLM. Mac users use LM Studio or llama.cpp (Metal/MLX acceleration).

faq.q: How do I choose among INT4, INT8, and FP16 quantization?
faq.a: FP16 = original precision, 2 bytes per parameter, best quality but the most VRAM (about 16GB for 7B). INT8 halves the VRAM (about 8GB for 7B) with very small quality loss. INT4 (q4_k_m) drops VRAM to about 1/4 (about 4-5GB for 7B), is the fastest, and loses only a single-digit percentage of quality, the sweet spot for personal deployment. Unless you are doing serious production or benchmarking, start at INT4 for personal local use.

faq.q: Which open-source model is best to run locally in 2026?
faq.a: All-round reasoning: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B/32B (distilled, small but strong). Chinese + multilingual: the Qwen3 series. General + ecosystem: Llama 4. Agent / tool calling: GLM-4-9B. Code: Qwen3 Coder / DeepSeek Coder. The top pick for indie developers is DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B (runs in 4GB of VRAM, with reasoning quality close to mid-tier cloud models).

faq.q: Is local deployment cheaper than using an API?
faq.a: It depends on volume. Low frequency (a few dozen calls a day): the API is cheaper, no GPU needed. High frequency + long-term + sensitive data: local pays off. One RTX 4090 (about ¥13,000) plus electricity (about 0.4 kWh/hour under load) running DeepSeek distilled 7B for a few thousand calls a day pays back in six months to a year, after which the marginal cost is close to electricity. The biggest value is not saving money, it is data staying local + unlimited calls + offline availability.

faq.q: Can a Mac run LLMs locally?
faq.a: Yes, and Apple Silicon's unified memory is a hidden advantage. On an M3/M4 Max with 64-128GB, most of the memory can serve as VRAM, so a quantized 70B will run. Use LM Studio (GUI) or llama.cpp (command line, Metal acceleration); the newer MLX framework is Apple-native and faster than generic options. A 128GB M4 Max running a quantized 70B is close to the experience of a professional card, while staying quiet and power-efficient.

zh.title: RAG vs 长上下文 vs Fine-tune 2026 完全指南：什么场景选什么
zh.metaTitle: RAG vs 长上下文 vs Fine-tune 2026 完全指南：什么场景选什么、花多少钱
zh.description: 2026 年 RAG、长上下文 + Prompt Caching、Fine-tune 三种方法的真实成本、性能、坑、混合最佳实践对比。10K query/天的 RAG 系统 $4-9K/月、Claude 缓存省 90%、Fine-tune 10-50× 更便宜，但 lost-in-middle 让长上下文准确率掉 20%。读完知道什么场景该选哪个，混合怎么搭。
zh.ogTitle: RAG vs 长上下文 vs Fine-tune 2026：三选一指南
zh.ogDescription: 真实成本、决策树、5 个场景实测，告诉你 2026 年该选哪条路。
zh.headline: RAG vs 长上下文 vs Fine-tune 2026 完全指南

related.label: 长上下文模型选型指南

faq.q: RAG、长上下文、Fine-tune 三个怎么选？
faq.a: 按问题本质选：知识库经常变 + 上 GB 级 → RAG；单份大文档反复问 + 不到 200K token → 长上下文 + Prompt Caching；要稳定的语气 / 格式 / 政策 / 分类 → Fine-tune。生产环境 90% 是混合：RAG 取事实 + Fine-tune 管行为 + 长上下文跑整文档。

faq.q: 长上下文是不是要取代 RAG 了？
faq.a: 对单文档场景已经在取代。Claude Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.7 / Gemini 3.1 Pro 都给 1M token 上下文，配合 Prompt Caching 把缓存输入打 1 折，单查询成本从 $0.30 降到 $0.03。但对真正大的知识库（GB / TB 级 / 几十万篇文档），长上下文塞不下，RAG 仍是唯一答案。两者不是替代关系，是规模分工。

faq.q: Prompt Caching 到底省多少钱？
faq.a: Anthropic 官方：缓存命中价是普通输入价的 0.1×（省 90%）。实测一个跑 10 万 token 上下文的 book-chat：首次请求成本不变，第二次起 TTFT 降 79%、缓存输入 token 成本降 90%。生产中稳定 system prompt 的 cache 命中率通常 80-95%。一个 $5,000/月的 RAG 应用接入 Prompt Caching 后能降到 $1,000 以下。

faq.q: Fine-tune 在 2026 年还值得做吗？
faq.a: 两类场景仍非常值：（1）每天 10 万+ 高频且任务定义清晰的查询（客服分类、内容审核、固定格式抽取），单查询成本能比大模型 + RAG 便宜 10-50 倍，几周内回本。（2）需要稳定 brand 语气 / 公司政策遵循 / 严格输出格式的产品。Fine-tune 不擅长教模型新事实——那是 RAG 的活。

faq.q: 长上下文有什么坑？
faq.a: 三个：（1）Lost-in-the-middle：关键信息放在长文档中间时，准确率比放在开头/结尾掉 10-20 个百分点，部分模型超过 20%。（2）速度慢：长上下文单查询 30-60 秒，RAG 通常 1 秒级。（3）虽然 Caching 降成本，但首次请求仍按完整价计，对低频访问的文档不划算。

faq.q: 混合系统的最佳实践？
faq.a: 2026 年生产环境主流：RAG 拿事实 + Fine-tune 管行为 + 长上下文跑整文档查询。实测准确率：混合 96%、纯 RAG 89%、纯 Fine-tune 91%。Anthropic 的 Contextual Retrieval 又把 RAG 召回失败率降 49%，开 reranker 后降 67%。具体拆分：volatile（易变）知识进 RAG、stable（稳定）行为进 Fine-tune、单 session 多轮深度问答用长上下文 + Caching。

en.title: RAG vs Long Context vs Fine-tune 2026: A Complete Guide to What to Pick When
en.metaTitle: RAG vs Long Context vs Fine-tune 2026: A Complete Guide to What to Pick and What It Costs
en.description: A 2026 comparison of the real cost, performance, pitfalls, and hybrid best practices of three approaches: RAG, long context + prompt caching, and fine-tune. A 10K query/day RAG system runs $4-9K/month, Claude caching saves 90%, fine-tune is 10-50x cheaper, but lost-in-the-middle drops long-context accuracy 20%. Read it to know what to pick when and how to combine them.
en.ogTitle: RAG vs Long Context vs Fine-tune 2026: A Pick-One Guide
en.ogDescription: Real cost, a decision tree, and 5 tested scenarios, telling you which path to pick in 2026.
en.headline: RAG vs Long Context vs Fine-tune 2026: A Complete Guide

faq.q: How do I choose among RAG, long context, and fine-tune?
faq.a: Choose by the nature of the problem: knowledge base changes often + at GB scale → RAG; a single large document asked repeatedly + under 200K tokens → long context + prompt caching; need stable tone / format / policy / classification → fine-tune. 90% of production is hybrid: RAG for facts + fine-tune for behavior + long context for whole documents.

faq.q: Is long context about to replace RAG?
faq.a: For single-document scenarios it already is. Claude Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.7 / Gemini 3.1 Pro all offer 1M-token context, and with prompt caching giving cached input a 90% discount, per-query cost drops from $0.30 to $0.03. But for truly large knowledge bases (GB / TB scale, hundreds of thousands of documents), long context can't hold it and RAG is still the only answer. They are not replacements for each other, they divide by scale.

faq.q: How much does prompt caching actually save?
faq.a: Anthropic's official figure: the cache-hit price is 0.1x the normal input price (90% off). Tested on a book-chat running a 100K-token context: the first request's cost is unchanged, and from the second on TTFT drops 79% and cached input token cost drops 90%. In production, a stable system prompt typically gets an 80-95% cache hit rate. A $5,000/month RAG app can drop below $1,000 after adding prompt caching.

faq.q: Is fine-tune still worth doing in 2026?
faq.a: Two kinds of cases are still very worth it: (1) 100,000+ high-frequency queries a day with a clear task definition (support classification, content moderation, fixed-format extraction), where per-query cost can be 10-50x cheaper than a big model + RAG, paying back within weeks. (2) Products that need a stable brand tone / company policy adherence / strict output format. Fine-tune is not good at teaching the model new facts, that is RAG's job.

faq.q: What are the pitfalls of long context?
faq.a: Three: (1) Lost-in-the-middle: when key info sits in the middle of a long document, accuracy drops 10-20 points versus the start/end, and more than 20% for some models. (2) Slow: a single long-context query takes 30-60 seconds, while RAG is usually around 1 second. (3) Although caching lowers cost, the first request is billed at full price, so it isn't worth it for low-frequency documents.

faq.q: What are the best practices for a hybrid system?
faq.a: The 2026 production mainstream: RAG for facts + fine-tune for behavior + long context for whole-document queries. Measured accuracy: hybrid 96%, pure RAG 89%, pure fine-tune 91%. Anthropic's Contextual Retrieval further cuts RAG recall failure by 49%, and 67% with a reranker. The specific split: volatile knowledge into RAG, stable behavior into fine-tune, single-session multi-turn deep Q&A via long context + caching.

zh.title: ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 会员到底买哪个（2026）：按预算和用途选
zh.metaTitle: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini 会员怎么选（2026）：价格快照 + 决策表

zh.ogTitle: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini 会员怎么选（2026）
zh.ogDescription: 三家会员同价 $20，按预算和用途给决策表 + 价格快照。国内用户看国产替代。
zh.headline: ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 会员到底买哪个（2026）

related.label: 国产 AI 模型全景

faq.q: ChatGPT Plus、Claude Pro、Gemini AI Pro 哪个最值？
faq.a: 同价 $20 档，看用途：全能和功能最全选 ChatGPT Plus；写代码 + 想省钱选 Claude Pro（年付 $17）；本来用 Google 又想要 YouTube Premium 选 Google AI Pro（$19.99 送 YouTube Premium Lite + 5TB）。

faq.q: $8 的 ChatGPT Go 值得吗？
faq.a: 同价位不如 Gemini AI Plus（$7.99）。Go 只是消息更多还带广告；AI Plus 便宜一分钱，还送 200GB 存储和视频生成额度。

faq.q: $100 的 ChatGPT Pro 和 Claude Max 有什么区别？
faq.a: ChatGPT Pro $100 是 2026 年 4 月对标 Claude Max 新开的档；Claude Max 5x $100 是 5 倍 Pro 用量。两者都要 $200 那档才给到各自的顶配能力（GPT-5.4 Pro / Max 20x）。

faq.q: 中国大陆能订阅这三家吗？
faq.a: 官方都不支持国内订阅和付款。建议国内用户用能直接订、支付宝/微信可付的国产会员（DeepSeek、通义、Kimi 等）。

faq.q: 价格会变吗？
faq.a: 会，而且变得快（ChatGPT Pro 2026 年 4 月才拆成 $100/$200，Gemini 套餐 5 月刚调整）。本页价格快照核于 2026-05-22，订阅前请以官网为准。

en.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which Subscription to Buy (2026)
en.metaTitle: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini Subscriptions (2026): Price + Decision Table
en.description: ChatGPT Plus $20, Claude Pro $20, Google AI Pro $19.99: which AI subscription should you buy? A decision table by budget and use case, plus a 2026-05 price snapshot across Free, Go, Plus, Pro, Max and Ultra.
en.ogTitle: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which Subscription to Buy (2026)
en.ogDescription: Three plans cluster at $20. A decision table by budget and use case, plus a current price snapshot.
en.headline: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which Subscription to Buy (2026)

faq.q: ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, or Gemini AI Pro: which is best value?
faq.a: All three are $20. By use case: ChatGPT Plus for the most complete toolkit; Claude Pro for coding on a budget ($17 annual); Google AI Pro ($19.99) if you want YouTube Premium Lite + 5TB and you are already on Google.

faq.q: Is the $8 ChatGPT Go worth it?
faq.a: Not against Gemini AI Plus ($7.99). Go just adds messages and still shows ads; AI Plus is a cent cheaper and bundles 200GB storage plus video-generation credits.

faq.q: What is the difference between the $100 ChatGPT Pro and Claude Max?
faq.a: ChatGPT Pro $100 is a tier OpenAI opened in April 2026 to match Claude Max; Claude Max 5x $100 is 5x the Pro usage. Each reserves its top capabilities (GPT-5.4 Pro / Max 20x) for the $200 step.

faq.q: Do prices change often?
faq.a: Yes, and quickly. ChatGPT Pro only split into $100/$200 in April 2026 and Gemini changed its plans in May. This snapshot is from 2026-05-22; confirm on the official pages before subscribing.

sources.claim: Google AI (Gemini) subscription tiers and pricing

zh.title: 2026 做 AI Agent 用哪个模型：工具调用、长任务、成本实测
zh.metaTitle: 2026 做 AI Agent 用哪个模型：工具调用、长任务、成本对比
zh.description: 做 AI agent 选模型和聊天不一样：要工具调用稳、长任务不漂移、成本可控。Claude、GPT-5.5、Gemini、DeepSeek、Qwen 横评 + 真实 token 成本算例 + 决策表。
zh.ogTitle: 2026 做 AI Agent 用哪个模型
zh.ogDescription: 工具调用、长任务、成本——agent 选模型的四个硬指标和决策表。
zh.headline: 2026 做 AI Agent 用哪个模型：工具调用、长任务、成本实测

faq.q: 做 AI agent 到底该用哪个模型？
faq.a: 默认用 Claude Sonnet 4.6（工具调用稳、长任务不跑飞），难任务升 Opus 4.7。要最成熟的 function calling 和结构化输出选 GPT-5.5；要长记忆、塞大量历史选 Gemini；想省钱就把简单子步骤切给 DeepSeek / Qwen。最好按步骤路由，不要全程只用一家。

faq.q: 为什么不能只看 LMArena 这类聊天榜单？
faq.a: 聊天榜测的是单轮回答质量，agent 要的是多步工具调用不崩、长任务不漂移、成本可控。看 τ-bench（工具调用）、SWE-bench（agent 编程）、Terminal-Bench（终端操作）更对口。

faq.q: Agent 的成本为什么比聊天高这么多？
faq.a: 因为 agent 每一步都把系统提示加全部历史加工具返回重新发一遍，token 随步数累积。一个 20 步的任务，token 量可能是单轮聊天的几十倍。用 prompt cache 缓存不变部分、把简单子步骤切给便宜模型，是控成本的两个主要手段。

faq.q: 开源模型（DeepSeek、Qwen）能做 agent 主力吗？
faq.a: 能做省钱的子步骤主力，但工具调用的稳定性和长任务一致性目前还是 Claude / GPT 更靠谱。务实的做法是混用：关键决策步用闭源旗舰，高频简单步骤用开源模型兜底。

faq.q: 上下文越长对 agent 越好吗？
faq.a: 长上下文能让 agent 记住更多历史和观察，减少丢状态，但也更贵、还可能迷失在中间。实践上是按需带历史加适当总结压缩，而不是无脑把全部都塞进去。

en.title: Which Model to Use for AI Agents in 2026: Tool Calling, Long Tasks, Real Costs
en.metaTitle: Which Model for AI Agents in 2026: Tool Calling, Long Tasks, Cost Compared
en.description: Choosing a model for agents is not like chat: you need reliable tool calls, low drift on long tasks, and controllable cost. Claude, GPT-5.5, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen compared, with a real token-cost example and a decision table.
en.ogTitle: Which Model to Use for AI Agents in 2026
en.ogDescription: Tool calling, long tasks, cost — the four hard metrics for picking an agent model, plus a decision table.
en.headline: Which Model to Use for AI Agents in 2026: Tool Calling, Long Tasks, Real Costs

faq.q: Which model should I use to build an AI agent?
faq.a: Default to Claude Sonnet 4.6 (steady tool calls, low drift on long tasks), escalate hard tasks to Opus 4.7. For the most mature function calling and structured output, GPT-5.5; for long memory and lots of history, Gemini; to save money, route simple sub-steps to DeepSeek / Qwen. Route per step rather than binding everything to one model.

faq.q: Why can't I just use a chat leaderboard like LMArena?
faq.a: Chat leaderboards measure single-turn answer quality. Agents need multi-step tool calls that do not break, long tasks that do not drift, and controllable cost. tau-bench (tool use), SWE-bench (agentic coding), and Terminal-Bench (terminal work) are the relevant ones.

faq.q: Why is agent cost so much higher than chat?
faq.a: Because every step resends the system prompt plus full history plus tool returns, so tokens accumulate with the step count. A 20-step task can be tens of times the tokens of a single chat turn. Prompt caching for the unchanging parts and routing simple sub-steps to cheaper models are the two main levers.

faq.q: Can open models (DeepSeek, Qwen) be the main agent model?
faq.a: They can carry the cheap sub-steps, but for tool-calling reliability and long-task consistency, Claude / GPT are still safer today. The pragmatic move is to mix: closed frontier models for decisions, open models as the fallback for high-frequency simple steps.

faq.q: Is longer context always better for agents?
faq.a: Long context lets an agent remember more history and lose less state, but it is also more expensive and can get lost in the middle. In practice, carry history as needed and summarize, rather than stuffing everything in.
